name: project-new-shoes
description: Project New Shoes browser runtime for the original Generals and Zero Hour engine

scripts.check:pages: node tools/build_trystero_bundle.mjs --check && node tools/build_seek_bzip_bundle.mjs --check && node tools/check_pages_sources.mjs && npm run test:launcher-file-collector && npm run test:launcher-big-directory-growth && node harness/webrtc_relay_selection_unit.mjs && npm run test:trystero-relay && npm run test:public-project-content && node tools/verify_crash_diagnostics_zero_overhead.mjs
scripts.build:port:threaded: CNC_BUILD_DIR=build/wasm-threaded CNC_DIST_DIR=dist-threaded CNC_PORT_THREADS=1 CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=cnc-port bash tools/build_wasm.sh
scripts.build:port:threaded:release: BUILD_TYPE=Release CNC_BUILD_DIR=build/wasm-threaded-release CNC_DIST_DIR=dist-threaded-release CNC_PORT_THREADS=1 CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-O2 WASM_EXCEPTIONS=1 CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=cnc-port bash tools/build_wasm.sh
scripts.build:port:release: BUILD_TYPE=Release CNC_BUILD_DIR=build/wasm-release CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=cnc-port CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-O2 WASM_EXCEPTIONS=1 bash tools/build_wasm.sh
scripts.build:port:release:js-eh: BUILD_TYPE=Release CNC_BUILD_DIR=build/wasm-release-js-eh CNC_DIST_DIR=dist-release-js-eh CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=cnc-port CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-O2 bash tools/build_wasm.sh
scripts.build:port:release:native-eh: BUILD_TYPE=Release CNC_BUILD_DIR=build/wasm-release-native-eh CNC_DIST_DIR=dist-release-native-eh CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=cnc-port CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-O2 WASM_EXCEPTIONS=1 bash tools/build_wasm.sh
scripts.transcode:bink-video: npm run extract:runtime-archives && node tools/transcode_bink_video_payloads.mjs artifacts/real-assets artifacts/browser-video/bink --expect-current-zh
scripts.test:issue-recorder: node tools/verify_crash_diagnostics_zero_overhead.mjs && node harness/issue_recorder_unit.mjs && node harness/network_diagnostics_unit.mjs && node harness/issue_dump_network_decode_smoke.mjs && node harness/issue_dump_upload_smoke.mjs && node harness/issue_recorder_ui_smoke.mjs
scripts.verify:threaded-play: npm run test:threaded-relaunch-exit-readiness && npm run verify:save-persistence-order && npm run verify:runtime-shutdown-order && npm run build:port:threaded && npm run build:port:threaded:release && node harness/threaded_play_gate.mjs
scripts.verify:launcher-polish: npm run verify:cursor-assets && npm run test:launcher-file-collector && node harness/launcher_polish_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:real-scorch-render: npm run build:port && SKIRMISH_START_SCORCH_PROBE=1 node harness/skirmish_start_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:real-heat-distortion: npm run build:port && REAL_FX_EXPECT_HEAT=1 node harness/real_fx_render_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:skirmish-music-transition: npm run build:port && SKIRMISH_START_EXPECT_MUSIC_STOP=1 node harness/skirmish_start_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:skirmish-esc-menu: npm run build:port && SKIRMISH_START_EXPECT_ESC_MENU_RESUME=1 node harness/skirmish_start_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:replay-roundtrip: npm run build:port:threaded:release && SKIRMISH_START_DIST=dist-threaded-release SKIRMISH_START_THREADS=1 SKIRMISH_START_REPLAY_ROUNDTRIP=1 SKIRMISH_START_PROFILE_DIR=artifacts/pw-profiles/replay-roundtrip node harness/skirmish_start_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:vertical-integrations: npm run build:wasm && npm run transcode:bink-video && node tools/run_vertical_integrations_smoke.mjs
scripts.pretest:all: node tools/verify_aiplayer_rally_offset.mjs && npm run test:d3d8-dxt-cpu-fallback && npm run test:d3d8-dxt-block-decode && npm run test:d3d8-dxt-cpu-fallback-browser && npm run test:stealth-module-data-default && npm run test:partition-detach-dirty

scripts.test:flightdeck-layout: CNC_BUILD_TARGETS=flightdeck-layout-smoke npm run build:wasm && node dist/flightdeck-layout-smoke.cjs
scripts.test:ww3d2-shipped-mesh-loader: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node tools/run_ww3d2_shipped_mesh_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/W3DZH.big
scripts.test:bink-video-provider: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node tools/run_bink_video_provider_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/GC_Background.bik artifacts/real-assets/VS_small.bik
scripts.test:bink-video-sidecar-provider: npm run build:wasm && npm run transcode:bink-video && node tools/run_bink_video_sidecar_provider_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/GC_Background.bik artifacts/real-assets/VS_small.bik

scripts.test:bink-provider-sidecar-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run transcode:bink-video && node harness/bink_provider_sidecar_browser_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/GC_Background.bik artifacts/real-assets/VS_small.bik artifacts/browser-video/bink/bink-browser-video-manifest.json
scripts.test:bink-videoplayer-sidecar-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run transcode:bink-video && node harness/bink_videoplayer_sidecar_browser_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/GC_Background.bik artifacts/real-assets/VS_small.bik artifacts/browser-video/bink/bink-browser-video-manifest.json

scripts.test:ww3d-terrain-tile-archive: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/terrain_tile_archive_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/TerrainZH.big
scripts.test:ww3d-terrain-tile-archive-scene: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/terrain_tile_archive_scene_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/TerrainZH.big
scripts.test:missile-garrison-bound: npm run build:port && node harness/missile_garrison_bound_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/INIZH.big
scripts.test:browser-audio-request-path: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/audio_request_path_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:browser-audio-mss-stream: npm run build:port && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/mss_stream_playback_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:browser-audio-miles-webaudio-vertic: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/audio_miles_webaudio_vertical_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:browser-lan-webrtc-four-player-thre: npm run build:port:threaded:release && CNC_MATCH_PLAYERS=4 CNC_THREADED=1 node harness/lan_webrtc_playable_match_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:browser-lan-webrtc-threaded-soak: npm run build:port:threaded:release && CNC_THREADED=1 CNC_NETWORK_DIAGNOSTICS=1 CNC_MATCH_SOAK_MS=15000 node harness/lan_webrtc_playable_match_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:browser-lan-webrtc-threaded-perform: npm run build:port:threaded:release && CNC_THREADED=1 CNC_NETWORK_DIAGNOSTICS=1 CNC_MATCH_SOAK_MS=15000 CNC_MIN_LOGIC_FPS=28 CNC_MAX_LOGIC_STALL_MS=1000 node harness/lan_webrtc_playable_match_smoke.mjs
scripts.test:real-big: npm run build:wasm && npm run verify:assets && node tools/run_real_big_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/INIZH.big
scripts.test:real-big-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run verify:assets && node harness/real_big_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/INIZH.big
scripts.test:runtime-archives-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/runtime_archives_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets
scripts.test:wasm: npm run build:wasm && EXPECT_WASM=1 node harness/smoke.mjs
